top_signals.title: Surging Bond Yields Add to Pressures Building for Fed’s Warsh
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh is poised to take the helm of the US central bank later this week facing pressure from the White House to deliver interest-rate cuts and growing resolve from his colleagues to stand pat. Now the bond market is piling on.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Musk and Altman take their battle from court to Wall Street ahead of landmark IPOs
top_signals.summary: Now that the Musk-Altman trial has reached a verdict, the two billionaires can turn their attention to readying their companies for the public market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sigma Lithium fights Brazil ruling after 15% shares slide
top_signals.summary: Brazilian court ruling and waste allegations pressure Sigma as the company advances expansion plans for its lithium operation.

top_signals.title: Zcash Foundation ends Q1 with $36.69M in liquid assets and operating expenses of $817K
top_signals.summary: Zcash Foundation Q1 operating expenses came in at about $817,000, with team compensation as the largest category.
